touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Mateus Yang introducing our platform's onboarding automation capabilities. No response received.
Follow-up cold email to Mateus Yang highlighting ROI case study from similar EdTech company. No response received.
Third cold email to Mateus Yang with personalized video about MatrixEdge's onboarding challenges. No response received.
Brief cold call with Mateus Yang. He expressed interest in learning more about onboarding automation and agreed to a qualification call next week.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently facing challenges with customer onboarding at MatrixEdge?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we're struggling to scale our onboarding process efficiently.

next_steps: Schedule qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Mateus Yang. Discussed current onboarding pain points, team size, and initial budget range. Mateus confirmed he's the VP of Customer Success and has authority to evaluate solutions.

questions_asked.question: What does your current onboarding process look like?
questions_asked.answer: Manual, lots of spreadsheets and email. Takes 2-3 weeks per cohort.

questions_asked.question: How many customers are you onboarding monthly?
questions_asked.answer: About 40-50 new enterprise customers per month.

questions_asked.question: What kind of ROI have other EdTech companies seen?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 40-60% reduction in onboarding time and 3x increase in team capacity.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Mateus with ROI calculator and case study from similar EdTech company. Mateus replied expressing interest in moving forward.

questions_asked.question: Can you share the case study you mentioned?
questions_asked.answer: Attached PDF showing 55% time reduction at a 4000-employee EdTech firm.

touches.ai_summary: Second qualification call with Mateus. Discussed technical requirements, integration needs with their LMS, and team composition. Mateus mentioned they're also looking at Clari.

questions_asked.question: What other solutions are you evaluating?
questions_asked.answer: We're looking at Clari as well, but your focus on onboarding automation is more aligned.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform integrate with Canvas LMS?
questions_asked.answer: We have native Canvas integration with bi-directional sync.

objections: Need to understand integration complexity before committing
next_steps: Schedule discovery call with broader team

touches.ai_summary: Email to Mateus with Canvas LMS integration documentation and implementation timeline. Mateus confirmed he wants to involve IT directors in next call.
next_steps: Schedule discovery call with IT team

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up call with Mateus to discuss discovery call agenda and stakeholder alignment. Confirmed Daniel Smith (CEO) will need to approve final decision.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in the decision process?
questions_asked.answer: Our CEO Daniel Smith will need to sign off, plus our IT directors Aisha Silva and Willow Wagner.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 6-8 weeks for companies your size.

next_steps: Prepare discovery call with full stakeholder group

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Mateus, Aisha Silva, and Willow Wagner. Deep dive into technical architecture, security requirements, and workflow customization needs. Team expressed strong interest in automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle SSO and user provisioning?
questions_asked.answer: SAML 2.0 with automatic user sync from your identity provider.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize workflows for different customer segments?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable workflow builder with conditional logic.

questions_asked.question: What are your top 3 onboarding bottlenecks right now?
questions_asked.answer: Manual task assignment, lack of visibility into customer progress, and inconsistent communication.

objections: Concerned about data migration from current system

touches.ai_summary: Email to Mateus and IT team with detailed data migration plan and security documentation. Team requested additional information on reporting capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting and analytics do you provide?
questions_asked.answer: Real-time dashboards, custom reports, and automated insights on onboarding performance.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with reporting demo video and sample dashboard screenshots. Mateus confirmed interest in moving to technical evaluation phase.
Call with Mateus to finalize technical evaluation agenda and discuss pricing expectations. Mateus mentioned budget is approved for around 60 seats.

questions_asked.question: What's your budget range for this initiative?
questions_asked.answer: We have approval for around $100K annually for 60 seats.

touches.ai_summary: Email to Mateus with technical evaluation access credentials and agenda. Confirmed session scheduled for next week with IT team.
Pre-evaluation call with Mateus to review technical requirements and success criteria. Discussed competitive comparison with Clari.

questions_asked.question: How do you differentiate from Clari's onboarding features?
questions_asked.answer: We're purpose-built for onboarding automation, while Clari is primarily revenue operations focused.

questions_asked.question: What will be the key evaluation criteria?
questions_asked.answer: Ease of use, integration capabilities, and automation depth.

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session with Mateus, Aisha Silva, and Willow Wagner. Hands-on testing of workflow builder, Canvas integration, and reporting. Team was impressed with automation capabilities but had questions about scalability.

questions_asked.question: How does the platform perform with 100+ concurrent onboarding workflows?
questions_asked.answer: We handle thousands of concurrent workflows with sub-second response times.

questions_asked.question: Can we white-label the customer-facing portal?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, full white-labeling with custom branding and domain.

questions_asked.question: How does this compare to what you've seen from Clari?
questions_asked.answer: Your onboarding focus is much stronger, but we need to compare pricing.

objections: Need to see how consulting services are structured

touches.ai_summary: Demo session with Mateus and extended CS team (8 attendees). Showcased real-world onboarding scenarios and automation workflows. Team asked detailed questions about customization limits.

questions_asked.question: Are there any limits on workflow complexity?
questions_asked.answer: No hard limits, but we recommend keeping workflows under 50 steps for maintainability.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle internationalization?
questions_asked.answer: Support for 25+ languages with automatic translation of customer communications.

questions_asked.question: What's your ideal go-live timeline?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to launch by end of Q2.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up demo focused on reporting and analytics capabilities. Mateus brought questions about data retention and export capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited retention with ability to export to your data warehouse.

questions_asked.question: Can we build custom reports using SQL?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, SQL-based custom reporting with direct database access.

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Mateus. Presented $101,100 ACV proposal for 60 seats with automations plus consulting package. Mateus requested adjustments to consulting hours.

questions_asked.question: Can we adjust the consulting hours allocation?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can customize the consulting package based on your needs.

questions_asked.question: What's your reaction to the overall pricing?
questions_asked.answer: It's within budget, but we need to compare to Clari's final proposal.

objections: Consulting hours seem high, want to reallocate to software licenses

touches.ai_summary: Additional demo for new stakeholders focused on executive dashboards and ROI tracking. Positive reception from team.

questions_asked.question: How do you calculate onboarding velocity metrics?
questions_asked.answer: Time-to-value tracking with milestone completion rates and bottleneck analysis.

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with CEO Daniel Smith and Mateus. Presented business case, ROI projections, and strategic value. Daniel asked about contract flexibility and competitor comparison.

questions_asked.question: What contract terms do you offer?
questions_asked.answer: Standard is annual with option for multi-year discount.

questions_asked.question: How do you compare to Clari on total cost of ownership?
questions_asked.answer: Our onboarding-focused approach delivers 40% lower TCO for this use case.

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline?
questions_asked.answer: We need to finalize by end of month to hit Q2 go-live.

touches.ai_summary: Proposal refinement call with Mateus. Discussed adjusted consulting package and implementation timeline. Mateus confirmed Daniel is supportive but wants to see final Clari comparison.

questions_asked.question: Where are you in the process with Clari?
questions_asked.answer: They're presenting final proposal next week, then we'll make decision.

questions_asked.question: Can you provide references from EdTech customers?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I'll connect you with 3 EdTech customers in similar growth stage.

touches.ai_summary: Second executive meeting with Daniel Smith. Addressed his questions about implementation risk, vendor stability, and long-term product roadmap.

questions_asked.question: What's your company's financial position and growth trajectory?
questions_asked.answer: Series B funded, 200% YoY growth, 500+ enterprise customers.

questions_asked.question: What are your top concerns at this stage?
questions_asked.answer: Making sure we pick the right long-term partner, not just the cheapest option.

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled executive meeting with Daniel Smith was rescheduled due to Daniel's conflict. Moved to next week.
Rescheduled executive meeting with Daniel Smith. Daniel indicated Clari's pricing came in lower and asked if we could match. Began negotiation discussion.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Clari's pricing at $85K?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with leadership. Our value proposition justifies premium pricing, but we can explore options.

questions_asked.question: Is pricing the only remaining consideration?
questions_asked.answer: No, we prefer your product, but need to justify the cost difference.

objections: Clari came in 15% lower on pricing

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled pricing call with Mateus was rescheduled due to Mateus being in customer escalation. Moved to later in week.
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call with Mateus. Discussed value justification and explored alternative package configurations. Mateus emphasized they prefer our solution but need pricing concession.

questions_asked.question: Can you reduce the consulting hours to lower overall price?
questions_asked.answer: We can adjust to 40 hours consulting, bringing total to $95K.

questions_asked.question: Would $95K work within your approved budget?
questions_asked.answer: That's closer, but Daniel is still pushing for us to get Clari to match your features at their price.

objections: Still need to close gap with Clari's pricing

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Daniel Smith to present revised $95K proposal. Daniel appreciated the concession but asked about multi-year discount options.

questions_asked.question: What discount could you offer for a 3-year commitment?
questions_asked.answer: We could offer 12% discount for 3-year upfront commitment.

questions_asked.question: Would multi-year commitment work for MatrixEdge?
questions_asked.answer: Potentially, but we need to discuss internally. Prefer annual with option to extend.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up executive meeting with Daniel Smith. Daniel confirmed they want to move forward at $95K annual pricing but need to finalize contract terms.

questions_asked.question: What are your payment terms?
questions_asked.answer: Standard is annual upfront, but we can accommodate quarterly for enterprise deals.

questions_asked.question: Are we aligned on moving forward at $95K?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, pending legal review of contract terms.

touches.ai_summary: Email to Mateus with revised contract at $95K including updated consulting package and payment terms. Mateus confirmed sending to legal team.
Negotiation call with Mateus to address legal team's contract questions. Discussed data processing addendum and liability caps.

questions_asked.question: Can you accept our standard data processing addendum?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can sign your DPA with minor modifications.

objections: Legal team wants higher liability cap
next_steps: Revise contract with DPA and adjusted liability terms

touches.ai_summary: Final pricing and contract review call with Mateus. Aligned on all terms including $95K ACV, 60 seats, reduced consulting package, quarterly payment terms, and revised DPA. Mateus confirmed Daniel will sign this week.

questions_asked.question: Are we fully aligned on all contract terms?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, everything looks good. Sending to Daniel for signature.

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off within 5 business days of signed contract.
